title: Conversion/Switch of Government of India Securities
description: Government of India announces the conversion/switch of its securities through auction for an aggregate amount of ₹30,000 crore (face value). The security-wise details of the conversion/switch are given as under: Date of Auction Source Securities Amount (FV) of Source Securities (in ₹ crore) Destination Securities April 20, 2026 (Monday) 5.74% GS 2026 (Maturing on Nov 15, 2026) 3,000 6.33% GS 2035 (Maturing on May 05, 2035) 8.24% GS 2027 (Maturing on Feb 15, 2027) 1,000 6.92% GS 2039
